title: Smoky Turkish Manti
description: Delicious and savory Turkish dumplings filled with a blend of smoky spices and served with a side of tangy sauce.
instructions: Combine flour, smoky spice blend, and salt in a mixing bowl.
Gradually add water to the mixing bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into small pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk and place a small amount of chewy cheese in the center.
Fold the dough over the cheese and press the edges together to seal the dumpling.
Repeat the process with the remaining dough and cheese.
Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the dumplings for 10-12 minutes.
Serve the dumplings with a side of tangy sauce.
